users.screen_subtitle: Invite, activate, and manage users for this organization.

users_screen.title: Users & roles
users_screen.no_users_body: Try selecting a different role or invite someone new to this workspace.
users_screen.role_permissions_description: What each role can do across modules. Edit by clicking a cell.
users_screen.invite_help: They'll receive an email with a magic link. The link expires in 7 days.
users_screen.invalid_invite: Enter a valid email and role.
users_screen.permission_denied: You do not have permission to manage users.
users_screen.role_assignment_subtitle: Pick a user, then the new role.
users_screen.role_assignment_preview: Assigning {role} to {user}. Previous role {previousRole} will be replaced.
users_screen.set_password_toggle: Set password instead of sending invite
users_screen.set_password_toggle_hint: Admin only — creates an active account immediately, no email sent.
users_screen.password_strength_hint: Use at least 12 characters with mixed letters, numbers, and symbols.
users_screen.create_user_help: The account is created active with this password. No email is sent.
users_screen.user_creation_forbidden_role: The selected role is a system role and cannot be assigned directly. Please choose a non-system role (e.g. NPD Manager, Viewer).
users_screen.assign_sites_dialog_subtitle: Choose which sites this user can see and select.
users_screen.assign_sites_help: The user will only see the selected sites.
users_screen.assign_sites_empty_hint: No sites selected — the user can see ALL sites (unrestricted).
users_screen.no_org_sites: No sites are configured for this organization yet.

roles.screen_subtitle: Review role categories and permissions used by Settings workflows.
roles.permission_missing: You do not have permission to perform this action.
roles.policy_read_only: You can view authorization policies, but cannot edit them.
roles.unavailable_body: The roles server loader has not been wired in this environment. No seed data is shown.
roles.state_empty: No system roles are configured yet.
roles.state_error: Roles and permissions could not be loaded.
roles.state_permission_denied: Read-only: settings.roles.assign is required to manage role assignments.

editor.code_hint: Lowercase slug, e.g. qa_reviewer. Owner/admin codes are reserved.
editor.system_locked: This is a system role. Its permissions are managed by the platform and cannot be edited here.

errors.invalid_input: Some fields are invalid. Check the role code and name.
errors.invalid_code: Use a lowercase slug: letters, digits and underscores (e.g. qa_reviewer).
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to manage roles.
errors.system_role_locked: System roles cannot be created or edited.
errors.code_taken: A role with this code already exists.
errors.invalid_permission: One or more selected permissions are not in the permission catalog.
errors.persistence_failed: The change could not be saved. Try again.

machines.noLocationsAvailable: No bin-level locations yet — the machine will be created unplaced. Add locations later to assign it.

schema_diff.forbiddenBody: You do not have permission to view schema diffs.
schema_diff.unableToLoadBody: Schema version history is unavailable for this migration.
schema_diff.noVersionsBody: No schema versions were found for {id}.
schema_diff.revertConfirmBody: This creates a new version restoring the JSON shape from v{version}. Existing rows are not migrated.
schema_diff.revertConfirmWarning: Reverting will increment the version to v{next}. The current v{current} is preserved in history.
schema_diff.revertUnavailableL1: L1 columns cannot be reverted from this screen. Use the L1 promotion flow to roll back.
schema_diff.revertUnavailableWindow: Revert is available only for the last 3 versions.
schema_diff.revertAvailable: Reverting will create a new version restoring the "Before" JSON.

rules_registry.readOnlyNotice: Rules are authored by developers and deployed via CI/CD. This view is read-only — contact your Monopilot implementation team to request rule changes.
rules_registry.provenance: Data source: listRules Server Action via withOrgContext (live org-scoped rule_definitions and rule_dry_runs).

reference.screen_subtitle: Maintain configurable reference rows and import or export CSV data.

import.title: CSV Import Wizard

import.headerGuidance: First row must contain column headers matching:
import.importPending: Import is ready to process after preview validation.
import.emptyRows: No preview rows yet. Upload a CSV to validate headers and rows.
import.errorForbidden: You do not have permission to import reference data.
import.errorGeneric: The CSV could not be processed. Check the file and try again.
import.safeguards: Loading state uses the upload/preview pending panel, empty state shows no preview rows, errors fail closed before commit, and unauthorized imports are blocked by the server action permission gate.

flags.cache_window: Provider values are cached for 60 seconds.

require_grn_qc_inspection.title: Require GRN QC inspection
require_grn_qc_inspection.description: Inbound GRNs must pass Quality inspection before stock is released.
require_grn_qc_inspection.coming_banner: When enabled, goods received against a PO are placed on a QA hold until a quality inspection is recorded.
require_grn_qc_inspection.read_only: You need settings.flags.edit to change this flag.
require_grn_qc_inspection.save_success: Quality flag saved and audit log recorded.

flags_admin.title: Feature flags
flags_admin.subtitle: Per-tenant toggles. L1 changes go through promotion; L2/L3 are editable here.
flags_admin.preflightNotice: Some flags trigger pre-flight checks. Example: enabling integration.d365.enabled validates 5 D365 constants + connection test.
flags_admin.permissionDenied: You need org admin access to view and change feature flags.
flags_admin.vSet43Body: NPD post-release edits require a policy that creates a new BOM/product-spec version and has authorizer roles configured.
flags_admin.defaultNpdDescription: Allow released NPD product/BOM edits after authorization.
flags_admin.defaultTechnicalDescription: Require Technical product-spec approval before factory use.

d365.export_only_notice: D365 is export-only for MES data.

sync.title: D365 sync config
sync.subtitle: Pull schedule, push queue, retry policy, and dead-letter queue access.

dlq.title: D365 DLQ manager
dlq.subtitle: Dead-lettered D365 sync jobs. Retry re-submits to D365; mark-resolved/skip records an authorized, audited acknowledgement after a manual fix.
dlq.forbidden: Access denied. The technical.d365.sync_trigger permission is required to manage the D365 dead-letter queue.
dlq.thresholdBanner: DLQ depth is {depth} — above the alert threshold of {threshold}. Investigate the D365 connector.
dlq.errorState: Unable to load the D365 dead-letter queue.
dlq.confirmRetry: Re-submit this dead-lettered job to D365?
dlq.confirmResolve: Mark this entry resolved? Use this only after the underlying issue was fixed in D365.
dlq.confirmSkip: Skip this entry? It will be dropped without being sent to D365.

drift.title: D365 drift resolution
drift.subtitle: Items where the MonoPilot value is newer than the incoming D365 value (V-TEC-73 — local edits win, overwrite was skipped). Accept applies an authorized, audited overwrite; Reject keeps the current value.
drift.forbidden: Access denied. The technical.d365.sync_trigger permission is required to resolve D365 drift.
drift.errorState: Unable to load D365 drift events.
drift.destructive: Destructive — the losing system will be overwritten on the next sync. Choose the winning value, then record an audited reason.
drift.directionMpWinsHint: Keep the MonoPilot value; the export worker pushes it to D365 on the next sync.
drift.directionD365WinsHint: Overwrite the MonoPilot item with the D365 value (authorized, audited import).
drift.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Field corrected in MP — ECO-2044 awaiting sync.
drift.actionFailed: Resolution failed. No drift was changed.

email_templates.title: Email templates
email_templates.subtitle: Trigger-driven transactional templates consumed by Planning, Shipping, QA.

tenant_migration_history.error: Unable to load tenant migration history.
tenant_migration_history.forbiddenBody: Access denied. The settings.audit.read permission is required to view Migration History.
tenant_migration_history.provenance: Data source: live tenant_migrations rows via withOrgContext; test props may inject deterministic rows for RTL.

rule_detail.dslSourceSub: Authored in the monopilot/rules repo — PR to change.
rule_detail.dslEmpty: DSL payload not yet indexed for this rule. Contact SRE.
rule_detail.dryRunResultsSub: Last 30 days of dry-run invocations against this rule.
rule_detail.noDryRuns: No dry-runs in the last 30 days — coverage MISSING.
rule_detail.moduleConsumersSub: Screens / flows that reference this rule.

schema_migrations_queue.title: Schema Migrations Queue
schema_migrations_queue.subtitle: Track L1 promotion requests from submission to completion. Reviewed and executed by MonoPilot superadmin.
schema_migrations_queue.noFilteredMigrationRequests: No migration requests for the selected filter.
schema_migrations_queue.error: Unable to load schema migrations queue.
schema_migrations_queue.forbidden: Permission denied for schema migrations queue.
schema_migrations_queue.provenance: Live rows are read from public.schema_migrations; requester names fall back to Schema admin until requester metadata is available.

manufacturing_operation_history.title: Manufacturing Operation History
manufacturing_operation_history.subtitle: Per-operation audit trail. Showing every create / update / delete event.
manufacturing_operation_history.forbiddenMessage: You do not have permission to view manufacturing operation history.
manufacturing_operation_history.empty: No entries match the current filters.
manufacturing_operation_history.error: Unable to load manufacturing operation audit history.

gallery.title: Modal gallery
gallery.subtitle: Developer reference for the shared modal system — one section per variant, each opening the real Modal component.
gallery.note: Click a trigger to open the modal. Every modal uses the shared @monopilot/ui/Modal primitive.

labels.title: Label templates
labels.subtitle: Printed labels for products, pallets, inner cases, and quarantine.
labels.empty_body: Create a template to design printed labels for products, pallets, and cases.
labels.permission_denied: You do not have permission to manage label templates.
labels.action_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

editor.permission_denied: You do not have permission to edit this template.
editor.canvas_hint: Click an element to select it, edit properties on the right.
editor.inspector_empty_hint: Click an element on the canvas to edit its properties. Use the palette on the left to add new elements.
editor.delete_confirm_body: This permanently deletes the label template “{name}”. This action cannot be undone.

documents.title: Document numbering
documents.subtitle: Number formats and archiving for purchase, transfer and work orders.
documents.empty: No document settings are configured yet.
documents.denied_body: You do not have permission to view document settings.
documents.read_only_notice: You can view document settings but cannot change them.
documents.field_prefix_hint: Leading text shown before the date and sequence, e.g. PO.
documents.field_archive_hint: Received/closed documents older than this move to the Archive tab in Planning. Leave empty to never archive.
documents.invalid_input: Check the highlighted fields and try again.

signoff.title: Sign-off policies
signoff.description: Configure how many e-signatures each approval requires and which roles may sign.
signoff.readOnly: You need admin rights to change sign-off policies.
signoff.permissionDenied: You need org admin access to view sign-off policies.
signoff.thresholdHelp: Consumption beyond required quantity above this tolerance requires supervisor PIN approval.
signoff.warnThresholdHelp: Consumption beyond required quantity above this threshold is recorded with a warning and flagged in the audit log. Must not exceed the approval tolerance.
signoff.warnAboveApprove: Warning threshold must be less than or equal to the approval tolerance.

machines.title: Machines
machines.description: Production machines available for process assignment and line configuration.
machines.readOnly: You need admin rights to manage machines.

partners.movedBody: Suppliers and customers are managed in their operational modules — there is one source of truth for each. Use the links below to maintain them.
partners.suppliersDescription: Supplier master records, specs and scorecards (Planning).
partners.customersDescription: Customer master records used for sales orders and shipping.
